title: 'Ephec #0658
definition:
Ephes Dammim = "edge of blood"

 1) a place approx 16 miles (25 km) southwest of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ephes Dammim = "edge of blood"

 1) a place approx 16 miles (25 km) southwest of Jerusalem

    NASB:  the two extremities (i.e. the soles of the feet or the ankles)
